title: taraxacum mailleferi
intro: Taraxacum mailleferi, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum mailleferi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum mailleferi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
